---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new formula or improvement to an existing one
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**What would you like to see**
A clear description of the new formula, version bump, or formula improvement.

**Why**
What problem does it solve? Link to the upstream project if applicable.

**Additional context**
Anything else useful — upstream release notes, related PRs, etc.
